message:
refactor(traits): Complete comprehensive traits refactoring across codebase

- Fix async_state_machine.zig to use runtime.OperatorMod/OperatorFloordiv
  for proper Python modulo/floor-div semantics (9 locations)
- Enhance OperatorFloordiv in builtins.zig to handle floats with @floor(a/b)
- Add new trait functions: isClassInstance, isCallable, isArray
- Extend binaryResultType with OperationHints for AST-level info
- Refactor expressions.zig inferBinOpWithInferrer to use traits (~55 lines reduced)
- Replace 56+ inline type checks with trait functions across 30+ files
- Apply needsPromotion() in assign_defer.zig

All Priority 1-4 items from traits refactoring plan now complete.
